title: wedelia gardneri
intro: Wedelia gardneri, also known as the Rosy Periwinkle or Dollar Flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia gardneri include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage. Wedelia gardneri can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
